input.command: gh api graphql -f query='query($owner:String!, $repo:String!, $number:Int!, $endCursor:String) { repository(owner:$owner, name:$repo) { pullRequest(number:$number) { reviewThreads(first:100, after:$endCursor) { nodes { isResolved isOutdated path comments(first:20) { nodes { id databaseId body author { login } createdAt url } } } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } } } }' -f owner='aryeko' -f repo='ghx-bench-fixtures' -F number=422

events.name: bash

input.command: gh api repos/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pulls/422/comments/2879346410/replies -f body='Concrete fix suggestion: replace `any` with a domain type (or `unknown` + narrowing). For example, define `type InputData = { id: string; values: number[] }` and update the signature to `fn(data: InputData)`. If the payload is not guaranteed, take `unknown` and validate fields with a type guard before use to keep type safety.' && gh api repos/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pulls/422/comments/2879346494/replies -f body='Concrete fix suggestion: wrap `JSON.parse` in a safe parser and handle failure explicitly. Example: `function safeParse<T>(raw: string): T | null { try { return JSON.parse(raw) as T } catch { return null } }`. Then check for `null` and return a controlled error/fallback instead of letting the throw escape.' && gh api repos/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pulls/422/comments/2879346575/replies -f body='Concrete fix suggestion: replace the constant `true` with real validation predicates for required fields. For example, verify object shape (`input && typeof input === "object"`) and required properties/types (`id` is string, `items` is array, etc.), then return `false` when checks fail. If no real validation is needed, remove this function and inline the constant at call sites.'
input.description: Reply to all unresolved PR review threads

events.content:
Done — I replied to all unresolved review threads on PR `#422` with concrete fix suggestions and did not make or push any code changes.

Replied threads:
- `https://github.com/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pull/422#discussion_r2879346410` (typed `data` parameter / avoid `any`)
- `https://github.com/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pull/422#discussion_r2879346494` (`JSON.parse` error handling)
- `https://github.com/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pull/422#discussion_r2879346575` (replace always-true validation with real checks)
